notes: v0.13.7 — STATS rebuilt as Match Replay Cards (6 KPI tiles + filter pills + wide hero cards per match), playtime is now tracked + shown. Panel backgrounds redesigned (no more visible banding, decor_only panels skip accent glow so SETTINGS/QUESTS aren't dyed cyan/green). Currency icon in first-clear rewards now uses canonical P1 hex coin like everywhere else. NOW PLAYING '?' removed when track has no labelled segments. Match log cap 10 → 30, per-match data extended with duration/pulse/rank. Windows only.
